mapper.sql: id, target_id, interface_name, interface_path, http_method, vuln_type, risk_level, params_config, payload_config, match_rules, enabled, priority, defense_rule_status, defense_rule_count, defense_rule_note, business_type, input_params, output_type, auth_required, content_type, external_request, file_operation, db_operation, inferred_vuln_types, scan_status, last_scan_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_scan_interface ( target_id, interface_name, interface_path, http_method, vuln_type, risk_level, params_config, payload_config, match_rules, enabled, priority, defense_rule_status, defense_rule_count, defense_rule_note, business_type, input_params, output_type, auth_required, content_type, external_request, file_operation, db_operation, inferred_vuln_types, scan_status, last_scan_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{targetId}, #{interfaceName}, #{interfacePath}, #{httpMethod}, #{vulnType}, #{riskLevel}, #{paramsConfig}, #{payloadConfig}, #{matchRules}, #{enabled}, #{priority}, #{defenseRuleStatus}, #{defenseRuleCount}, #{defenseRuleNote}, #{businessType}, #{inputParams}, #{outputType}, #{authRequired}, #{contentType}, #{externalRequest}, #{fileOperation}, #{dbOperation}, #{inferredVulnTypes}, #{scanStatus}, #{lastScanTime}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_scan_interface WHERE target_id = #{targetId} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY priority ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_scan_interface WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY priority ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_scan_interface ORDER BY priority ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_scan_interface WHERE vuln_type = #{vulnType} AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY priority ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_scan_interface SET target_id = #{targetId}, interface_name = #{interfaceName}, interface_path = #{interfacePath}, http_method = #{httpMethod}, vuln_type = #{vulnType}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, params_config = #{paramsConfig}, payload_config = #{payloadConfig}, match_rules = #{matchRules}, enabled = #{enabled}, priority = #{priority}, defense_rule_status = #{defenseRuleStatus}, defense_rule_count = #{defenseRuleCount}, defense_rule_note = #{defenseRuleNote}, business_type = #{businessType}, input_params = #{inputParams}, output_type = #{outputType}, auth_required = #{authRequired}, content_type = #{contentType}, external_request = #{externalRequest}, file_operation = #{fileOperation}, db_operation = #{dbOperation}, inferred_vuln_types = #{inferredVulnTypes}, scan_status = #{scanStatus}, last_scan_time = #{lastScanTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_scan_interface SET defense_rule_status = #{defenseRuleStatus}, defense_rule_count = #{defenseRuleCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_scan_interface WHERE interface_path LIKE CONCAT('%', #{interfacePath}, '%') ORDER BY priority ASC, create_time DESC
